allow: Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-ChildItem Cert:\\CurrentUser\\My | Where-Object { $_.Subject -like '\\''*Folderly*'\\'' } | Select-Object Subject, Thumbprint | Format-Table -AutoSize')

PowerShell($msbuild = "${env:ProgramFiles}\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\18\\Community\\MSBuild\\Current\\Bin\\MSBuild.exe"; & $msbuild .\\src\\Folderly.App\\Folderly.App.csproj /t:Restore,Build /p:Configuration=Release /p:Platform=x64 /p:RuntimeIdentifier=win-x64 /p:SelfContained=false; if \(-not $?\) { throw "Folderly.App build failed" })

PowerShell($msbuild = "${env:ProgramFiles}\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\18\\Community\\MSBuild\\Current\\Bin\\MSBuild.exe"; & $msbuild .\\src\\Folderly.ContextMenu\\Folderly.ContextMenu.csproj /t:Restore,Build /p:Configuration=Release /p:Platform=x64 /p:RuntimeIdentifier=win-x64 /p:SelfContained=false /v:m; if \(-not $?\) { throw "Folderly.ContextMenu build failed" })

PowerShell($msbuild = "${env:ProgramFiles}\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\18\\Community\\MSBuild\\Current\\Bin\\MSBuild.exe"; & $msbuild .\\src\\Folderly.Package\\Folderly.Package.wapproj /t:Restore,Build /p:Configuration=Release /p:Platform=x64 /p:RuntimeIdentifier=win-x64 /p:SelfContained=false /v:m; if \(-not $?\) { throw "Folderly.Package build failed" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== logs ディレクトリ ==="; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Folderly\\logs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object Name, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "=== 最新ログ末尾 120 行 ==="; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Folderly\\logs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1 | Get-Content -Tail 120)

PowerShell($msbuild = "${env:ProgramFiles}\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\18\\Community\\MSBuild\\Current\\Bin\\MSBuild.exe"; & $msbuild .\\src\\Folderly.App\\Folderly.App.csproj /t:Restore,Build /p:Configuration=Release /p:Platform=x64 /p:RuntimeIdentifier=win-x64 /p:SelfContained=false /v:m; if \(-not $?\) { throw "Folderly.App build failed" }; & $msbuild .\\src\\Folderly.ContextMenu\\Folderly.ContextMenu.csproj /t:Restore,Build /p:Configuration=Release /p:Platform=x64 /p:RuntimeIdentifier=win-x64 /p:SelfContained=false /v:m; if \(-not $?\) { throw "Folderly.ContextMenu build failed" }; & $msbuild .\\src\\Folderly.Package\\Folderly.Package.wapproj /t:Restore,Build /p:Configuration=Release /p:Platform=x64 /p:RuntimeIdentifier=win-x64 /p:SelfContained=false /v:m; if \(-not $?\) { throw "Folderly.Package build failed" })
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Folderly\\logs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1 | Get-Content -Tail 60)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "${env:ProgramFiles}\\Microsoft Visual Studio" -Recurse -Filter MSBuild.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 FullName)
